title: The Love Statue
writer: David E. Durston, Robert A. Poore
actors: Peter Ratray, Beti Seay, Harvey J. Goldenberg
plot: Wimpy struggling Greenwich Village painter Tyler Westin is in love with gorgeous, but mean and snippy cabaret dancer Lisa, who treats Tyler like dirt and constantly belittles him. Sultry nightclub singer Mashiko turns Tyler on to ...
